query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `erp_api_settings` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `serviceKey` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `serviceName` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `apiKeyEncrypted` text,
  `apiKeyMasked` varchar(50),
  `extraConfig` text,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `updatedBy` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `erp_api_settings_serviceKey_unique` (`serviceKey`)
);

-- Insert default service entries
INSERT IGNORE INTO `erp_api_settings` (`serviceKey`, `serviceName`, `isActive`) VALUES
('openrouter', 'OpenRouter AI', true),
('gemini', 'Google Gemini AI', true),
('kakao', '카카오 알림톡', true),
('slack', 'Slack 알림', true),
('runway', 'Runway 영상 생성', true),
('n8n', 'n8n 자동화', true),
('manus', 'Manus AI 에이전트', true),
('pixabay', 'Pixabay 이미지', true);
